title: After the Osaka Hai: Hands to the Sky

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Being selfish just causes trouble for everyone else.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I had to prove that the sacrifices they made in
sending me off were worth it. I couldn't afford to
waste a single second.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Because I love my family.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I was afraid my sisters would think I was getting
special treatment. I didn't want to see the family I
worked so hard to support fall apart.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I convinced myself I had to become this reliable older sister. I had to protect our cozy home in any way I could.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(But the truth is I'm not the big hero I thought I
could be. I'm still just plain old me...)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(And my family loves me just the way I am...
They're happy to bless me with all their support.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I... am Ines Fujin, and right now, I can just keep on
enjoying racing.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... These cheers are so loud!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: This feels incredible!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(If running with 100% of my strength is what I
do...)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(I want to spread my arms wide and welcome
everyone's feelings with 100% of my energy too.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm back, Trainer! And I want to discuss our next
goal!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I was thinking we could do the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Takarazuka Kinen is a 2,200-meter G1 held
in June. It's a grand prix, meaning the most
popular runners get to take the turf.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You need a lot of fans to run in a grand prix,
right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So that got me thinking—maybe running in the
Takarazuka Kinen means you're, like, carrying the
weight of people's dreams.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I know that compared to others, there might not
be as many people who see their dreams in me,
but still...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I want to stand on that great big stage and live
up to those dreams anyway. I want to show that I
can bear that burden.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Caught up in her sheer determination, I find
myself imagining who else might be running in this
year's Takarazuka Kinen.
choice_data_list:
That means you'll have to beat Mejiro Ryan and
Mejiro McQueen.

That means you'll have to beat Mejiro Ryan and
Mejiro McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hm? Ryan and McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
How do you know they'll be there? The spring G1
races have only just started, right?
choice_data_list:
Because I know everyone's expecting great
things from them both.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan and Mejiro McQueen have both been
the subject of an enormous amount of attention
lately.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure if "perfect" is the word, but the way
McQueen stalks the pace before overpowering
the competition is really something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And then there's Ryan, who's gained popularity
by displaying a level of determination worthy of
her family name, remaining resilient no matter
what.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They've both become pillars of the current racing
scene.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So they're going to be entering for sure. If this is
going to be the race of people's dreams, those
two have got to be there.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Haha... Now I get it! I really am hopeless, aren't
I?!
choice_data_list: People are expecting great things from you too!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Oh—I mean, thanks for the vote of
confidence, but... I wasn't really talking about my
chances in the race.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It's just that... I've been so focused on myself
recently, I feel like I've been living under a rock.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It's like the only thing I've been thinking about is
me, you know? I really think I should broaden my
perspective.
choice_data_list:
But there's nothing wrong with being totally
focused on one thing.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh? You always have to back me up like that, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's my job as her trainer to support her, after all.
And besides...
choice_data_list:
I want you to be totally absorbed in running,
that's all.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Huh? But I'm pretty sure I'm already too absorbed
in it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching Ines Fujin scratch her cheek sheepishly,
I'm reminded of the conversations I've had with
others about her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We all feel exactly the same way.
choice_data_list:
(We all want her to enjoy racing to the absolute
fullest.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's why, as her trainer, I'll continue to do my
best to support her! And now it's time to focus on
our next goal—the Takarazuka Kinen!
